overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a dark, abandoned wooden house with leaded glass windows. The character walks through multiple rooms, ascends and descends a wooden staircase, and examines the environment before approaching an exit door leading to a brick courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor room of abandoned wooden house

agents.ego_description: walking through the ground floor room examining the leaded glass windows and wooden interior details

entered.detail: tall leaded glass windows with diamond pattern allowing daylight to enter the dark interior
dark wooden floorboards with scattered debris and dust
dark wooden paneled walls with timber framing
wooden furniture piece against the wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt explores the ground floor of a dimly lit abandoned house. Daylight filters through tall leaded glass windows, illuminating the dusty wooden floorboards and dark paneled walls. The character walks slowly, examining the sparse furnishings including a wooden cabinet.

events.description: character begins ascending the wooden staircase to the upper floor

agents.ego_description: climbing the creaky wooden stairs while looking around the dimly lit stairwell

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with dark steps leading upward
simple wooden handrail along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep wooden staircase in the center of the house. The stairwell is darker than the ground floor, with a simple wooden railing on the right. The leaded glass windows are now visible to the right as the character climbs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor room with window views

events.description: character approaches window and looks outside at neighboring half-timbered buildings

agents.ego_description: walking around the upper floor room and looking out the leaded glass windows at the exterior buildings and greenery

segments.scene_description: On the upper floor, Geralt explores a room similar to the one below, with multiple leaded glass windows. He approaches the windows to look out at neighboring half-timbered buildings and greenery. The wooden staircase is temporarily out of view as he moves to the far side of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to ground floor via staircase

events.description: character descends wooden staircase back to ground floor level

agents.ego_description: carefully descending the wooden stairs and returning to the ground floor area

entered.detail: same wooden staircase now being descended

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the staircase and descends back to the ground floor. The lighting remains dim in the stairwell. Upon reaching the bottom, the ground floor room with its leaded glass windows and wooden cabinet comes back into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor approach to exit door

events.description: character approaches wooden door leading outside to brick courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking toward the exit door and looking outside at the brick wall and greenery visible through the opening

entered.detail: dark wooden door leading to the exterior
red brick wall visible through the open door outside

segments.scene_description: In the final moments, Geralt approaches a wooden door on the ground floor. Through the opening, a red brick exterior wall and greenery become visible, indicating the exit to the outside. The character moves toward the door, transitioning from the dark interior to the bright exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit abandoned house that transitions from the dusty ground floor to an elevated vantage point. It begins with Geralt walking across wooden floorboards where daylight filters through tall leaded glass windows and illuminates dark paneled walls. As he moves deeper into the interior, the camera follows him up a steep wooden staircase, shifting into a darker stairwell where the windows remain visible to the right. The scene then opens into an upper room of similar design, moving away from the stairs as the character approaches the glass to look out over neighboring half-timbered buildings and greenery.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim interior of a wooden house toward the bright light of an outdoor courtyard. It begins as the character descends a staircase, moving through the shadows of the stairwell back toward the ground floor. As the camera reaches the bottom, the room opens up to reveal leaded glass windows and a wooden cabinet under muted lighting. The scene then shifts toward a wooden door, where a glimpse of a red brick exterior wall and greenery appears through the opening. Finally, the character moves through the doorway, transitioning from the dark, enclosed atmosphere of the house into the vivid brightness of the outside.
